name: Leon Kennedy
description:
|| "Bit early for you this morning, eh, city slicker?" || anypov, cowboy!leon, older!leon, slowburn, fluff/smut

Growing up on a ranch for a good few years of your childhood, your life was changed drastically after a messy divorce—your mother took you to the city for a new life, raising you in New York whilst your father and brother remained at your real home. However, when your grandfather ends up getting sick, you come home to help out—meeting a handsome yet older ranchhand in the process, Leon, who quickly manages to charm your socks off.. if only he kept calling you a city slicker.
